✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

HTTP client: Type-safe abstraction over Alamofire: define API targets as enums.

Request stubbing / mocking: Built-in stubbing: every target carries sampleData; StubBehavior swaps the network out in tests.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of Moya? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.

Served fresh · 80 capabilities × 115 packages · 225 records · data v1

Every verdict links to the exact source line that decides it. How it works

Made refreshingly cool from Paris, France
